title: Ultra-Realistic IMAX-Grade Cinematic Action Shot
sourceTitle: Image To Image Imax Skyscraper Climbing Action Shot AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image ultra-realistic IMAX-grade cinematic action shot using uploaded face and hairstyle reference before skyscraper climbing action transformation, preserving same man or woman from the uploaded reference while climbing a modern glass skyscraper. Subject: same man or woman from the uploaded reference keeps exact facial structure, proportions, skin tone, hairstyle, identity, micro-details, and natural imperfections while wearing futuristic clear-framed glasses, premium black fitted t-shirt, black tactical pants, padded black gloves with bright green LED accents, black tactical climbing boots. Scene: towering modern glass skyscraper with ultra-reflective facade and detailed city far below creates extreme vertical scale with reflective glass panels, sky reflections, detailed cityscape far below, walkways, green circular park, tiny traffic, and strong depth. Composition: 9:16 extreme high-angle perspective from massive height; subject positioned on the right side, body stretched dynamically across the reflective facade, one leg raised gripping glass, other bent for support, both palms pressed tightly to the glass. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image imax skyscraper climbing action shot source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Clear daylight blues, glass reflections, black tactical clothing, bright green LED accents, gold boot details, city greens, and realistic skin tones from the reference. Lighting: Bright natural daylight with sharp directional shadows, reflective glass bounce, clear face readability, LED accent glow, and strong depth-of-scale contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
